sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.DataQ.Description: Specifies the container that runs the monitoring job.
Configures the constraints and baselines for the monitoring job.
A list of inputs for the monitoring job. Currently endpoints are supported as monitoring inputs.
The output configuration for monitoring jobs.

sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.JobDe.Description: The name for the monitoring job definition.

sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.JobRe.Description: Identifies the resources to deploy for a monitoring job.

sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.Netwo.Description: Specifies networking configuration for the monitoring job.

sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.RoleA.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that Amazon SageMaker can assume to perform tasks on your behalf.

sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.Stopp.Description: A time limit for how long the monitoring job is allowed to run before stopping.

sagemaker.dataqualityjobdefinition.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
